dataset.name: Lending Club loan dataset for granting models

en: Pinned the UCM-curated Zenodo archive and verified its 167,468,415 bytes plus published MD5 and locked SHA-256.
Parsed month vintages, removed 0 duplicate IDs, retained explicit no-information employment encodings, and excluded free text/ZIP from modeling.
Audited 16,657 missing titles and 1,228,582 missing descriptions; neither text field enters the model.

Selected 120,000 applications by deterministic ID hash within disjoint chronological windows so the browser artifact stays reviewable; the resulting IDs are pseudonymous and linkable within the artifact, not anonymous.
zh: 固定 UCM 精选的 Zenodo 数据档案，核验其 167,468,415 字节、公开 MD5 与锁定 SHA-256。
解析月度发放批次，删除 0 条重复 ID，保留明确的就业信息缺失编码，且邮政编码数据与自由文本均不纳入建模。
审计 16,657 个缺失标题与 1,228,582 个缺失描述；两文本字段均不进入模型。
在互斥时间窗口内按确定性 ID 哈希抽取 120,000 条申请，确保浏览器产物可审阅；所得 ID 为产物内可关联的假名标识，非匿名。

en: Baseline: L2-regularized logistic regression over scaled numeric and one-hot categorical application-time features.
Nine source features enter both models: log reported income, capped DTI, log requested amount, FICO, entity-experience flag, employment months, purpose, home ownership, and state.
Challenger: 240-tree depth-4 XGBoost; both scores are independently isotonic-calibrated on the calibration window.
Score columns retain float64 precision, and AUC, Brier, log-loss, and default rate are computed after rereading the final Parquet.

Top-three reason codes are the largest absolute per-application XGBoost SHAP contributions and encode whether each contribution increases or decreases PD. EAD is requested amount; LGD is a disclosed 45% assumption.
The legacy display fields utilization, late payments, and bureau age are respectively mapped to requested-amount/income and explicit unavailable sentinels; they are not model inputs.
zh: Baseline：基于缩放数值特征与 one-hot 申请时点类别特征，拟合 L2 正则逻辑回归。
9 项来源特征同时进入两模型：log 申报收入、截断 DTI、log 申请金额、FICO、机构经验标记、就业月数、用途、住房状态与州。
Challenger：240 棵、深度 4 的 XGBoost；两组分数各自在标定窗口内独立进行保序校准。
分数字段保留 float64 精度，AUC、Brier、log-loss 与违约率均在重新读取最终 Parquet 后计算。
每条申请的前三原因码取 XGBoost SHAP 绝对贡献最大的三个特征，并编码其对 PD 的升降方向。EAD 为申请金额；LGD 系明确披露的 45% 假设。
旧版展示字段 utilization、late payments、bureau age 分别映射为申请金额/收入及明确的不可用哨兵；均不作为模型输入。

en: Train 72,000 / calibration 24,000 / backtest 24,000; time cutoffs end 2015-12 and 2016-10.
Preprocessing and DTI caps fit on train only; isotonic maps fit on calibration only; all reported metrics use later backtest outcomes.
zh: Train 72,000 / calibration 24,000 / backtest 24,000；时间截断点为 2015-12 与 2016-10。
预处理与 DTI 截断仅拟合于 train；isotonic 映射仅拟合于 calibration；所有报告指标均使用更晚的 backtest 结果。

en: Observed outcome is the archive's final resolution: charged-off/default = 1 and fully paid = 0.
No transitory loan state is relabeled, and no protected-class or fairness label is inferred.
zh: 观察结果采用档案中的最终结局：charged-off/default = 1、fully paid = 0。
不重新标记任何过渡性贷款状态，亦不推断受保护类别或公平性标签。

en: The pipeline fails closed on the source size, MD5, SHA-256, application grain, split coverage, score bounds, outcome types, and exactly three reason codes; verification recomputes AUC, Brier, log-loss, and default rate from the exact Parquet columns.
The Parquet embeds DOI, authorship, license, hashes, time cutoffs, algorithm versions, sampling rule, metric-recomputation rule, and LGD/display-field assumptions.
zh: 源文件大小、MD5、SHA-256、申请粒度、拆分覆盖度、分数边界、结果类型或恰好三个原因码任一异常，流水线均 fail-closed（失败即拦截）；验证时从同一份 Parquet 的对应列重算 AUC、Brier、log-loss 与违约率。
Parquet 内嵌 DOI、作者、许可证、哈希、时间截断、算法版本、抽样规则、指标重算规则及 LGD/展示字段假设。

changed.en: Real is the default requested source. Once scored-backtest.parquet verifies, real mode compares calibrated scores on observed later outcomes: baseline Brier 0.1593, challenger Brier 0.1593, 21.82% observed defaults. If the artifact is missing or invalid, the real path fails closed and the real-artifact state remains explicitly pending or blocked; separately, the active data falls back to the governed synthetic walkthrough.
changed.zh: 真实数据为默认请求来源。scored-backtest.parquet 校验通过后，真实模式基于更晚的观察结果比较校准分数：基线 Brier 0.1593，挑战者 Brier 0.1593，观察违约率 21.82%。若该产物缺失或无效，真实路径直接阻断，真实产物状态明确保持为 pending 或 blocked；与此同时，当前激活数据单独回退至受约束的合成数据。

boundaries.en: The archive contains granted loans only, so rejected applicants and acceptance-population policy effects are not represented. No production decisioning, causal impact, regulatory validation, or fairness conclusion; home-ownership slices are descriptive only.
boundaries.zh: 该档案仅含已授信贷款，未覆盖被拒申请人或受理人群的策略效果。不声称生产决策、因果影响、监管验证或公平性结论；住房状态切片仅供描述。
